title: pouteria paraensis
intro: Pouteria paraensis, also known as Para Pouteria or Pau Brasil, is a species of flowering plant in the family Sapotaceae, native to the Amazon rainforest in South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Pouteria paraensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and improve oral health. Pouteria paraensis can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusement, and is also used in some folk remedies to treat various health conditions.
